allow: PowerShell(Write-Host "=== Checking common Android SDK paths ==="; $paths = @\("$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk", "C:\\Android\\Sdk", "$env:ProgramFiles\\Android\\Android Studio", "${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\Android\\Android Studio", "D:\\Android\\Sdk", "E:\\Android\\Sdk"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Host "FOUND: $p" } else { Write-Host "NOT: $p" } }; Write-Host "=== Gradle wrapper ==="; if \(Test-Path "e:\\SX\\weisheng-app-main\\weisheng-app-main\\android\\gradlew.bat"\) { Write-Host "EXISTS" } else { Write-Host "NOT FOUND" })
